title: ‘We Aren’t Rats Who Flee in Hard Times’: TMC MP Kirti Azad Stands Firm With Mamata, Slams Rebel MLAs
description: Kirti Azad defends Mamata Banerjee as TMC reels from rebellion. Kalyan Banerjee issues ultimatum over Abhishek, while Sonia Gandhi invites Mamata to rejoin Congress amid party crisis.
